dashboard_meta.architecture: Layer 1 agents are sealed independent raw signal producers. No cross-agent communication.
dashboard_meta.weekend_rule: BTC remains open on weekends. USD, EUR, GOLD and NQ do not issue 24h calls on Saturday or Sunday.

3d.reason: USD bullish overall driven by strong primary drivers including US 2Y yield rise, hawkish Fed bias, positive US economic surprise, and equities weakness in risk-on regime. However, bearish signals from VIX level, US-DE rate differential narrowing, DXY weakness, and Dollar Smile regime temper conviction. Real yield and gold signals are neutral. The mix of bullish and bearish primary drivers and moderate active participation lead to a strong bullish direction but with some caution.
